name: Apple Cider Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 450 degrees.
Combine flour, baking powder, sugar and salt; cut in butter until coarse crumbs form. Stir in cider mixture until soft dough forms. Turn dough onto lightly floured surface. Knead into a small ball. Pat out to 1/2 inch thick with floured cutter. Cut biscuits. Place 1 inch apart on ungreased sheet. Sprinkle with cinnamon. Bake 12-15 minutes. Cool on rack. Makes 8 2-1/2-inch biscuits.
National Pike Inn, New Market, Maryland
